description_long: This lamp features a striking geometric design with sharp, angular panels forming a star-like silhouette. The body is composed of intersecting triangular and polygonal shapes, giving it a modern, abstract appearance. Two large, circular elements resembling eyes are set on either side, adding a whimsical or artistic touch. The lamp's surfaces are smooth and appear to be made of a matte, light gray material, with some darker gray accents. The overall structure is tall and narrow, with a wide base for stability. Its unique form makes it a bold statement piece suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A tall, angular lamp with intersecting geometric panels and large circular side accents, finished in matte gray tones. Its modern, abstract design stands out as a decorative urban fixture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharp, star-like arrangement of panels and the symmetrical, pointed structure.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the rectangular central body and one large circular accent, with the angular panels extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the layered geometric panels and both circular accents, emphasizing the lamp's symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other circular accent and the angular extension of the panels.
